pitGateField.note: null indicates missing — this is the block cause

sourceGateSpecAlignment.note: P33 FinancialReport scan follows source-gate spec pattern: documents gateResult (BLOCKED), sourceName, entersAlphaScore, blockReason. No live dry-run sample is produced (blocked source).

mode.note: P33 is a readiness scan, not yet a full dry-run sample execution. Full dry-run sample (P34) will use mode=source-present-dry-run.

dryRunStatus.note: readyScanResult=ELIGIBLE maps to dryRunStatus=READY for the full dry-run sample. Full dryRunStatus will be set in P34.

dryRunSampleSpecAlignment.note: P33 is a readiness/gate scan, not a full dry-run sample execution. P32PREP dry-run-sample spec is the target for P34. P33 demonstrates all required governance flags and classification fields are in place for the transition to P34.

backwardCompatibilityNotes: P33 readiness scan artifacts are consistent with P32 dry-run sample pattern
P33 introduces 'readiness scan' as a pre-stage before full dry-run sample execution (P34)
P33 FinancialReport BLOCKED status is a new classification path not seen in P32 (which was fully READY)
P33 NewsEvent ELIGIBLE status maps cleanly to P32's READY dryRunStatus for P34 full execution
All 5 governance hard flags (entersAlphaScore, paperOnly, dryRun, notInvestmentRecommendation, noBuySellActionSemantics) are preserved throughout
